queries.question: List all analgesic drugs, their side effects and manufacturers.
queries.sql: SELECT Name, Manufacturer, Side_Effects FROM Medications WHERE Classification = 'Analgesic'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?manufacturer ?side_effects WHERE {
  ?medications a :Medications .
  ?medications p:name ?name .
  ?medications p:Manufacturer ?manufacturer .
  ?medications p:Side_Effects ?side_effects .
  ?medications p:Classification ?classification_f .
  FILTER(STR(?classification_f) = STR("Analgesic"))
}

queries.question: Show all the drugs manufactured by 'Bayer' along with their side effects and effectiveness.
queries.sql: SELECT Name, Side_Effects, Effectiveness FROM Medications WHERE Manufacturer = 'Bayer'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?side_effects ?effectiveness WHERE {
  ?medications a :Medications .
  ?medications p:name ?name .
  ?medications p:Side_Effects ?side_effects .
  ?medications p:Effectiveness ?effectiveness .
  ?medications p:Manufacturer ?manufacturer_f .
  FILTER(STR(?manufacturer_f) = STR("Bayer"))
}
